typewriter.prefix: I'm a Frontend Engineer who builds

underConstruction.title: Under Construction
underConstruction.description: This page is currently under construction. You can still check my connections <link>here</link>.

notFound.catchphrase: Well, this is awkward. The page you're looking for doesn't exist. But hey, at least we have a cat picture to make it better, right?

connect.title: Connect
connect.description: I'm always open to new opportunities and collaborations. Feel free to reach out to me through any of the platforms below!
connect.sendMessage: Or if you prefer, send me a message

form.title: Send a Message
form.description: I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
form.messagePlaceholder: Tell me what's on your mind…
form.sendError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

error.title: Message Not Sent
error.description: Something went wrong while sending your message.
error.hint: Please <tryAgain>try again</tryAgain> or <goBack>go back to links</goBack>.

success.title: Message Sent!
success.description: Thank you for reaching out. I'll get back to you as soon as possible.
success.nextSteps: In the mean time you can <goBack>go back</goBack> or <sendAnother>send another message</sendAnother>.

validation.nameInvalidChars: {label} may only contain letters, spaces, hyphens, and apostrophes.
validation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

resume.title: Resume
resume.description: Here's an overview of my professional journey, skills, and experiences. Feel free to download my full resume or explore my past experiences.

projects.title: Projects
projects.description: Welcome to my GitHub playground. While my day-to-day enterprise code is private, these repositories showcase my personal experiments, ongoing studies, and open-source projects. Dive into the code and see what I've been tinkering with.
projects.noResults: No projects found with these filters.
projects.alreadyInProject: You just pierced the space-time and returned to the same project! Be careful not to create a temporal paradox!
projects.spaceTimeWarning: You did it again! The space-time is starting to become unstable!
